name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Largest Rescue Package in American History
body:
Help is here... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Largest Rescue Package in American History](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the CARES Act (The Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security Act) which the President signed into law over the weekend. You may be interested to learn who will benefit from this $2.2 trillion bill, perhaps even you and your family. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Everything Will Be Okay](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this week's blog post, I discuss an encouraging initiative in a Georgia community to help local artists and lift everyone's spirits during these trying times. I also discuss recent legislation to alleviate the coronavirus crisis including the Senate's multitrillion-dollar coronavirus response package agreed upon late last night. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Coronavirus](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-u/)
Coronavirus (COVID-19) is on everyone's mind. In fact, the first three cases of Coronavirus have been confirmed in Ohio. In this week's blog I discuss this ongoing challenge, what steps have been taken from the executive and legislative level, and finally offer some words of hope and encouragement. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [My Take on Super Tuesday](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-n/)
Yesterday was Super Tuesday. 14 states across the country held their primaries, and one territory, American Samoa. The results were pretty interesting. Joe Biden, who looked like his campaign was on life-support, won BIG. And the press dutifully changed their tone. Joe is now the comeback kid! [Read more >](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-p/) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhhdjik-kujkulhluu-z/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

Dear supporters, Thank you. Thank you for sticking with this campaign, and keeping our movement strong in the face of this crisis. I have been working very long hours on the phone, calling many of you to ask if you could chip in before our March 31 deadline, for the last quarterly fundraising report before our election. I'm honestly blown away by your commitment and generosity in this difficult time. Despite the challenges of having to cancel all of our March fundraisers, thanks to you, we still finished this quarter with our strongest numbers yet. _Thank you_. These funds will enable us to scale up our phone banking, texting, social media and other strategies to talk to voters who are staying home in April. With so much happening with the virus, and with the fast moving politics of bailouts coming from Congress, our social media feeds on Twitter and Facebook are busier than ever. Please follow and share as I try to bring you solid info, inspiring messages, and progressive prospectives. Stay healthy, stay home, and stay in touch. Onward, Doyle
---

We support you. We know this pandemic is, in many cases, hitting you harder. Doyle will follow your lead, and fight like hell for your inalienable rights to your yourself, in every space. No matter what. #tdov. Thank you to Colin Laurel and Forward Together for the artwork!

**VIRTUAL PHONE BANKING IS A HIT!** Are you socially distanced but wanting to stay connected? Virtual phone banking is the place to be! It is super easy to get virtually trained by one of our amazing Political Action fellows, and once you're up and running you can make up to one hundred calls in just one hour, spreading the word about Doyle and connecting with your neighbors! Join us twice weekly!

Hey Peter, What would you do if your pension was reduced, and you had no say in the matter? This is what happened in 2013 with the passage of a new budget deal intended to cut 1% off of annual Cost of Living Adjustments for military pensions. This Act was passed with 55 Democratic votes on its way to a 64-36 Senate vote and subsequent passage. Supporters of veterans and the military were alarmed — many of those affected have served in Iraq and Afghanistan. How was this reduction fair? In our latest blog post, read more about this budget deal and what transpired after it was passed.

| Friends, The past few weeks have been an anxious, difficult time for all us here in New Hampshire. Families are worried about their health, their jobs and their loved ones. We are all doing what we can to prevent the spread of the disease with social distancing and safely helping our neighbors in need. I pray daily, but during times like these that frequency increases. I think it is important to keep God in our lives, especially when things are toughest. That’s why I am inviting all of you to my Power of Prayer event on Tuesday, April 7 at 7PM. Join us for this tele and online event live from the safety of your home.
I am not a minister, rabbi, priest or member of any clergy. I am a common man who wants to help. We both know that prayer works, let's spread that hope to others. This is a free event. Please RSVP below and we will email you a dial-in number. Join us, please. Thank you. \- Matt

P.S. if you have a prayer request for someone in need, please [add their name in this form](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzkwNDU4MDczNzI1ODAxNzE5JmM9czhpNCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzM5NTAzNDImZD13OXg4ZzV0.fEl8kqoP1Jt8FzXnOU3WJ7Ux0CGcxWn_UxLpcNP1-BQ) and we will add them to our prayer list.

subject: In this together

body:
Friend, I want to personally reach out today to say thank you. Your support is what drives this campaign, and it’s why we were able to meet our very important first quarter fundraising goal.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16799600/178813444/460726911?refcode=em_ty_2020.04.02_b1_ed_all&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mzc4Njc0ZS1mNTc0LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4lvPzafuStkeJPaFOb1oXCzpis6ll5hJGXYvoduVhr0=) Friend,

I want to personally reach out today to say thank you. Your support is what drives this campaign, and it’s why we were able to meet our very important first quarter fundraising goal.

Friend, this race is about fighting on behalf of Pennsylvania families and addressing the issues we all care about -- such as ensuring affordable health care access, lowering prescription drug costs, and protecting Medicare and Social Security. It’s more clear now than ever that we need policies that will make life easier for hard-working Americans.

While it won’t always be easy, I believe that we will win this election in November and create a better future for South Central Pennsylvanians together. I’m so grateful to have you by my side along the way, friend.

Thank you again for your support, and I hope you’re staying safe and healthy!.

In this together,

Eugene | Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: An update on our State Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | A quick convention update. Hoosier Democrats -- First, we hope you are staying safe. In trying times, Hoosiers always rise to meet the challenge. If you’re looking for ways to help, or need a hand, we’ve put together a statewide list of resources [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16806075/178868331/125652814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODU2NTc5Yi0wNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6gzbIhQCgiX3Qrru4coTNeMQ6Pn4wn6VZ8K36RgYE88=&emci=c9b5e56e-ff74-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=f856579b-0775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535). Second, we wanted to give you an update on the State Convention. Our team is working non-stop to prepare options, and we intend to hold our Party’s convention on June 13. We’re looking at all possibilities, including exploring a digital convention, delegate voting by mail, and even online voting. Next week, the State Central Committee will meet to discuss this, as well. We are in discussions with the Democratic National Committee about any changes needed to our Delegate Selection Process for the Democratic National Convention, which appears to now be moving to mid-August in Milwaukee. Bottom line: we wanted you and everyone else interested to know that we’re working to have our Convention on June 13. Stay safe and healthy, and we’ll stay in touch with you as plans come together. Team IDP Indiana Democratic Party
115 W Washington
INDLPS, IN 46202
United States |

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: #INThisTogether
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb knows we’re all looking forward to that day when we can get back to our typical routines and that day will come, but we need to act | | [](InThisTogetherCampaign.com) |
---|---|---
Friend,

From the outset of the COVID-19 pandemic, Governor Holcomb has reminded us that we’re all in this together.

And he’s right – we _**are**_ all in this together and one of the silver linings of all this is that Indiana is pulling together like never before.

Yesterday, Governor Holcomb launched a new social distancing campaign. _**#INThisTogether**_ aims to keep Hoosiers healthy so we can return to our regular lives sooner.

Partners in this new campaign include:
* Eli Lilly
* Indiana University
* Indianapolis Colts
* Indiana Pacers
* Purdue University

_**“Social distancing is the best tool we have to flatten the curve, and I’m encouraged Hoosiers are hunkered down.”**_

Hoosier MVPs like Pacers star _**Victor Oladipo,**_ Indiana Fever legend _**Tamika Catchings**_ and Indianapolis Colts linebacker _**Darius Leonard**_ are helping Governor Holcomb kickoff the campaign.

Follow their social media accounts to see their messages and share your own _**#INThisTogether**_ message with your followers and help us _**spread the word, not the virus.**_ You can learn more about the campaign at _**[INThisTogetherCampaign.com](INThisTogetherCampaign.com)**_

_**“Whenever we’ve faced a challenge before, Hoosiers have always stepped up to meet that challenge and answered that call.” – Governor Holcomb**_

We can slow the spread. We can flatten the curve.

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: Cheri Bustos, DCCC Chairwoman
subject: Raising the stakes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
One of my favorite parts about serving as Chairwoman of the DCCC is meeting with the incredible challenger candidates from across the country. These folks are brave enough to step off the sidelines and put their name on the ballot to fight for a better future for their communities, and I'm honored to be working with them.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LTEtz6sLZret0qKj5tbgx6OfNiYNjWosfWe8auNcjzw=/iadSAlSUme75mzmq9-oZWGFMm9gvO6xzeOrWhjhD9gA=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.02_CB_b1_all&amount=10)
---
|
Hi Team,

One of my favorite parts about serving as Chairwoman of the DCCC is meeting with the incredible challenger candidates from across the country. These folks are brave enough to step off the sidelines and put their name on the ballot to fight for a better future for their communities, and I'm honored to be working with them.

I've gotten to know Sri Preston Kulkarni well, and I can confidently say that he is exactly the type of leader that TX-22 deserves to have fighting for them in Washington. **That 's why I'm so proud to announce that we've named him to our highly competitive Red to Blue program.**

Sri is primed to tackle the tough task of flipping their seat from red to blue, but he needs your help to do it.

[**Will you make a $10 grassroots contribution right now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LTEtz6sLZret0qKj5tbgx6OfNiYNjWosfWe8auNcjzw=/iadSAlSUme75mzmq9-oZWGFMm9gvO6xzeOrWhjhD9gA=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.02_CB_b1_all&amount=10)

**Now that we 've raised the stakes by placing Sri's campaign at the center of our offensive battlefield, Washington special interests will stop at nothing to defeat him -- including spending huge sums of money on misleading attack ads.**

Sri is running a true people-powered campaign, so he is relying on support from folks like you to win big on Election Day and restore real leadership to their communities. [**That 's why it's so important for you to pitch in today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/LTEtz6sLZret0qKj5tbgx6OfNiYNjWosfWe8auNcjzw=/iadSAlSUme75mzmq9-oZWGFMm9gvO6xzeOrWhjhD9gA=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.02_CB_b1_all&amount=10)

Thank you for everything,

Cheri Bustos
Chairwoman, DCCC
---
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LTEtz6sLZret0qKj5tbgx6OfNiYNjWosfWe8auNcjzw=/iadSAlSUme75mzmq9-oZWGFMm9gvO6xzeOrWhjhD9gA=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.02_CB_b1_all&amount=10)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/LTEtz6sLZret0qKj5tbgx6OfNiYNjWosfWe8auNcjzw=/iadSAlSUme75mzmq9-oZWGFMm9gvO6xzeOrWhjhD9gA=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.02_CB_b1_all&amount=10)

These folks are brave enough to step off the sidelines and put their name on the ballot to fight for a better future for their communities, and I'm honored to be working with them. I've gotten to know Sri Preston Kulkarni well, and I can confidently say that he is exactly the type of leader that TX-22 deserves to have fighting for them in Washington. That 's why I'm so proud to announce that we've named him to our highly competitive Red to Blue program. Sri is primed to tackle the tough task of flipping their seat from red to blue, but he needs your help to do it. Now that we 've raised the stakes by placing Sri's campaign at the center of our offensive battlefield, Washington special interests will stop at nothing to defeat him -- including spending huge sums of money on misleading attack ads. Sri is running a true people-powered campaign, so he is relying on support from folks like you to win big on Election Day and restore real leadership to their communities. Thank you for everything, Cheri Bustos Chairwoman, DCCC | Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | * Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at = | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

subject: join me tonight at 7pm? 💻
body:
Join Me Tonight At 7PM | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace.org/join-me-tonight-at-7pm?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=1184227810&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=66336a173b&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Dear Friends,

I hope you and your family are doing okay. As we all continue doing our best to settle into our new normal, staying strong in following social distancing measures and hunkering down at home, it's important for you to know what's going on . . .

Lot's happening -- and fast -- that may affect your business, your work, and your day to day life.

South Carolinians can find resources on my website: [nancymace.org/corona](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8a387ac517&e=f1831b4ca2)[-virus](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=379bb82fe4&e=f1831b4ca2). There, you can learn how to [apply for unemployment benefits](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=4a479ec4a6&e=f1831b4ca2) and small business owners can learn how to [apply for SBA loans](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=efb2cad6fe&e=f1831b4ca2), and more.

I invite you to tune into [my Facebook LIVE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=5e4209c6a8&e=f1831b4ca2) taking place tonight at 7:00 PM.
[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=67cfc97159&e=f1831b4ca2)
There are key updates and actions being taken at the state level that may affect your business. I want to make sure you have a platform to ask questions and to hear about what SC is doing to stop the spread.

I've talked with everyone from hospital leaders, physicians, nurses, DHEC, SCDEW, law enforcement, business owners, neighbors, you name it: listening to concerns, getting questions answered, helping find solutions.

I hope you'll join me tonight so I can learn more about how to help you at this time. See you [HERE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2fc1484042&e=f1831b4ca2) at 7:00 PM.

I am always here to help.
---
| Sincerely,

[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8ae3e9b8e2&e=f1831b4ca2)

P.S. Don't forget to take a moment to [refer to this page how to keep you and yours safe from the spread of coronavirus HERE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=329ee67c01&e=f1831b4ca2). Stay safe, sanitize, and social distance. Thank you! I am here to help.
---
|
---
| **COVID-19 Signs and Symptoms**
Fever, cough, chest pain, and shortness of breath.
_Visit_ : [CDC.gov](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c968ce6410&e=f1831b4ca2).

**Telemedicine**
MUSC and Roper Saint Francis offer telemedicine or virtual health screenings for FREE for Corona Virus.
_Visit_ : [MUSC Cares](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=395b2e97e9&e=f1831b4ca2) and [RSFH Virtual Health](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=d9111a3f1f&e=f1831b4ca2)

**South Carolina CoronaVirus Dashboard**
_Visit_ : [scdhec.gov/covid19dash](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e3ec4825a5&e=f1831b4ca2)

**Small Business Disaster Relief**
The federal government is offering disaster loans to small businesses.
_Visit_ : [disasterloan.sba.gov/ela](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=6c816abecf&e=f1831b4ca2).

**Filing for Unemployment**
Gov. McMaster has shortened the timeframe for individuals to receive unemployment by one week.
_Visit_ : [SCDEW.gov](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9ee075302a&e=f1831b4ca2).

**Help Our Medical Professionals**
MUSC is accepting donations for Personal Protective Equipment (PPE). To learn what their needs are and how to donate, visit: COVID-19 Donations to MUSC Health.

_General supplies needed:_
N95 masks, surgical masks, protective eyewear, face guards and face shields, hand sanitizer, industrial cleaning wipes, thermometers (all kinds)

_Pharmacy needs:_
Ethanol, Azithromycin, 200-proof USP-grade alcohol, Hydroxychloroquine

_Donations_ may be dropped off at 4295 Arco Ln. in North Charleston, Monday through Friday from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.

**JOB OPENINGS FOR HEALTHCARE WORKERS**
The South Carolina Medical Association and the South Carolina Hospital Association have joined together to create a database where physicians/licensed personnel can enter their information in order to be hired by S.C. Hospitals who are in need of personnel during the COVID-19 crisis. The database can be found at the following link: [https://scha.org/helpnow](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f9ca64969b&e=f1831b4ca2)

---
|
# Helpful Links
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=872140b19e&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**FACEBOOK LIVE TONIGHT:** I'll host another summary of health issues, small business, unemployment, your questions answered. 7PM at [www.facebook.com/nancyrmace](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=af8a841341&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a41b74da88&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**UNEMPLOYMENT PSA:** I spoke with SC Department of Employment and Workforce getting your unemployment questions answered.
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f9f0e4dd4b&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**HEROES NEED MASKS DONATION DRIVE:** Local surgeon, Dr. Zeigler, created Heroes Need Masks with his brother to collect donations for our medical workers, nurses, physicians and those on the front lines.
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3312e01472&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**HOW TO MAKE A MASK:** For those who are most crafty, here is a how-to sew masks for yourself, friends, neighbors, and others who may become ill to help prevent the spread of the virus.
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3104b034d7&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**FLATTENING THE CURVE:** Please watch our PSA on how to flatten the curve.

name: MJ Hegar Endorsement Alert
subject: This one is BIG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're going to win in Texas, and we're going to protect reproductive rights

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4d6/4136719102/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **_** Endorsement Alert: **_**
**PLANNED PARENTHOOD ACTION FUND
Endorses MJ Hegar after she stands up for reproductive rights**

**[Pitch in now to help elect a Texas-tough working mom and combat veteran to the U.S. Senate>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4d5/4136719102/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-PPAFendorsement?refcode=email_20200402.1nd__1150__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
This is a huge update in the race, Peter! Planned Parenthood Action Fund is all-in for MJ!

Planned Parenthood Action Fund supports strong reproductive health champions who are running for office, who they believe have what it takes to win. Now they're endorsing MJ because she's shown all her life that she can take on -- and win -- tough fights, and they know she'll be a champion for reproductive rights. **[Will you join Planned Parenthood Action Fund in supporting MJ?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4d5/4136719102/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-PPAFendorsement?refcode=email_20200402.1nd__1150__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**In recent weeks, Texas politicians have tried to exploit this pandemic to undermine our reproductive health and rights.** MJ and Planned Parenthood Action Fund are standing against these attacks, and are fighting for millions of people and their families. **With your help, we will make sure that Texas has elected officials who will fight for fundamental reproductive rights for everyone.**

It's going to take someone **tough** to win the biggest battleground state, but _The Washington Post_ has ranked this Senate seat as one of the ten most likely to flip -- and MJ has what it takes to do it. That's why Planned Parenthood Action Fund is all-in for MJ.
**Will you pitch in to help elect combat veteran and working mom MJ Hegar, and defeat Mitch McConnell 's right-hand man, Sen. John Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4d4/4136719102/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-ppafendorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200402.1nd__1150__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4cb/4136719102/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-ppafendorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200402.1nd__1150__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4ca/4136719102/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-ppafendorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200402.1nd__1150__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4c9/4136719102/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-ppafendorsement?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200402.1nd__1150__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4c8/4136719102/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-ppafendorsement?refcode=email_20200402.1nd__1150__")**
The path to a new Senate -- one that defends reproductive rights, protects and expands our health care, tackles climate change, and finally passes immigration reform -- runs straight through Texas. If you're ready to send MJ to fight for us in that new Senate, donate today.
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4d5/4136719102/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-PPAFendorsement?refcode=email_20200402.1nd__1150__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
\-- Team MJ

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4cf/4136719102/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1150&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a7/7f51f7bc/4cf8dabd/4ef1c4ce/4136719102/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

MJ and Planned Parenthood Action Fund are standing against these attacks, and are fighting for millions of people and their families. With your help, we will make sure that Texas has elected officials who will fight for fundamental reproductive rights for everyone. It's going to take someone tough to win the biggest battleground state, but The Washington Post has ranked this Senate seat as one of the ten most likely to flip -- and MJ has what it takes to do it. That's why Planned Parenthood Action Fund is all-in for MJ. Will you pitch in to help elect combat veteran and working mom MJ Hegar, and defeat Mitch McConnell 's right-hand man, Sen. John Cornyn? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" The path to a new Senate -- one that defends reproductive rights, protects and expands our health care, tackles climate change, and finally passes immigration reform -- runs straight through Texas. If you're ready to send MJ to fight for us in that new Senate, donate today. "" \-- Team MJ | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

body:
The Democratic Party has gone too far!
Friend,

The Democratic Party has gone too far!
While millions of Americans waited on the critically needed coronavirus relief bill, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer held it up as they tried to coerce Republicans into adding items from their Socialist agenda like the Green New Deal, Planned Parenthood funding, more power to big Labor Unions, and $25 Million Dollars for the Kennedy Center opera house.
It's never been more important for Conservatives everywhere to stand together against the radical Left. We MUST prevent Democrats like Chuck Schumer from taking over the Senate this November.
_And with one of the Left 's top targets being Republican Joni Ernst in Iowa, it's crucial that we do everything possible to keep her seat from being flipped in this year's election!_

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: New Paycheck Protection Program Offers Real Relief for Small Business
body:
The $350 billion Paycheck Protection Program "will immediately get cash in the hands of small and midsize businesses." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d301f5cd2e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **New Paycheck Protection Program Offers Real Relief for Small Business**

“We cannot solve the economic crisis until we solve the public health crisis caused by the coronavirus, but we can take steps to ease the financial pain for our nation’s employers and their employees. And that is what Congress did last week,” Sen. Marco Rubio (R-FL) writes for Fox Business.

The $350 billion Paycheck Protection Program “will immediately get cash in the hands of small and midsize businesses to keep Americans tied to their jobs.” As long as employers use the loan “for payroll costs like salaries and cash tips, as well as debt obligations like mortgage, rent, utilities, and insurance premiums, it would be forgiven in full.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e7adf64b9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| If the Communist Party of China had reported the true size of China’s outbreak, “public-health experts would’ve been sounding much louder alarms at the start — and the rest of the world would have begun making much greater preparations, sooner . . . A University of Southampton study estimates 95 percent of infections would have been avoided if China had acted just three weeks earlier,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2e49e48a6&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Democratic California Gov. Gavin Newsom praised President Donald Trump for the way he has handled the coronavirus pandemic, especially in his state. ‘Let me just be candid with you. I’d be lying to you to say that (Trump) hasn’t been responsive to our needs. He has,’” Newsom told CNN. Read more from Henry Rodgers in [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45f649c895&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| A few media outlets have discussed ending live coverage of White House Coronavirus briefings, preferring Americans not hear from their President directly. “Cutting off the president’s microphone hardly restores confidence in a collective institution that seems hopelessly partisan and one-sided,” Jarrett Stepman writes in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62917e5ce8&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1b707ec7a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02e7d8918c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=92c6c7fe3e)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: New prosperity for our region and small businesses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, This week I addressed the Wyoming County Chamber of Commerce virtually to discuss my plans to bring new prosperity to our region and to our small businesses. As a small businessman myself, I understand the challenges our small business owners are facing in New York State, and especially during this time of increased economic constraint. In Congress I will be focused on working with President Trump to deliver real results for our district including updating out infrastructure. Not only does this mean roads and bridges, but also access to rural broadband and clean water. President Trump endorsed me because he knows that I am ready to get to work for the people of Western New York, and put our district and America First in Congress! Watch below to hear my address: [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/Z0763NQqRPPD6ZXYq4b2lHCA/wJxMAds52sy73vt3MRxczw) Sincerely, Chris Jacobs

body:
Together, we can get through this.
|

| | It's hard to believe we won our primary only one month ago. The past month has been challenging but together, we were able to reach our first FEC fundraising goal of the election year. Thank you for being part of this fight. Friends, I'm grateful for this strong grassroots team and for the hardworking Americans in North Carolina and across the country who are on the frontlines, fighting this health crisis. **While we can 't be together in person right now, it's important that we stay connected. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16813472/178939956/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVlMTVkOS0yMjc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWTGd4vcX0XzAxst60T911xlJzVemdT35PzwNNIaIVc=&emci=9d705f3e-1375-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=085e15d9-2275-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Team -- I first want to thank every single person who contributed to our campaign this past quarter. Without you, we would not be able to keep this campaign going, nor would we have the chance to bring real representation to Southwest Florida. I know that budgets have been stressed and anxiety has been increasing, and this makes me all the more grateful to everyone who contributed. I also want to extend my gratitude to all of you who have supported me in the past, who have reached out to volunteer, and who continue to believe in our mission. Thank you! Over the last several weeks, I have spent my days at home, but still working hard to help our community weather this pandemic. I am so grateful to all of those individuals and organizations that are also working on our behalf: the healthcare workers who are on the front lines, the food banks, those taking meals to and checking in on the elderly, the teachers who have reimagined their classrooms, the cafeteria workers who are preparing and handing out student lunches, the foundations that are stepping in to assist those that need it. I also think daily about the grocery store workers who show up day in and day out, risking their health to ensure that we all have access to basic necessities. **Ours is a community that cares. Ours is a community that comes together in times of hardship. I am so proud to be a part of it.** Please know that we are here if you need us. To that end, we’ve created a website with information you need to navigate this crisis. Please visit [www.swfloridacovid.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16813473/178939957/-198399239?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVlMTVkOS0yMjc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWTGd4vcX0XzAxst60T911xlJzVemdT35PzwNNIaIVc=&emci=9d705f3e-1375-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=085e15d9-2275-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) and let us know if there is anything we can do to help. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16813474/178939958/-198399239?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVlMTVkOS0yMjc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWTGd4vcX0XzAxst60T911xlJzVemdT35PzwNNIaIVc=&emci=9d705f3e-1375-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=085e15d9-2275-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Over the last several weeks, although physically distant, we have come together in so many impactful ways. And together, we will slow the spread of this virus by doing our part -- by staying home, strictly limiting our contact with others, and continuing to frequently wash our hands. Thank you again for all of your support. I look forward to the time when we will again meet face to face. \-- Margaret | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16813475/178939959/-756790116?refcode=E2042-20200402-EOQTY-footer&amount=20.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVlMTVkOS0yMjc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWTGd4vcX0XzAxst60T911xlJzVemdT35PzwNNIaIVc=)

clean_body: Team -- I first want to thank every single person who contributed to our campaign this past quarter. Without you, we would not be able to keep this campaign going, nor would we have the chance to bring real representation to Southwest Florida. I know that budgets have been stressed and anxiety has been increasing, and this makes me all the more grateful to everyone who contributed. I also want to extend my gratitude to all of you who have supported me in the past, who have reached out to volunteer, and who continue to believe in our mission. Thank you! Over the last several weeks, I have spent my days at home, but still working hard to help our community weather this pandemic. I am so grateful to all of those individuals and organizations that are also working on our behalf: the healthcare workers who are on the front lines, the food banks, those taking meals to and checking in on the elderly, the teachers who have reimagined their classrooms, the cafeteria workers who are preparing and handing out student lunches, the foundations that are stepping in to assist those that need it. I also think daily about the grocery store workers who show up day in and day out, risking their health to ensure that we all have access to basic necessities. Ours is a community that cares. Ours is a community that comes together in times of hardship. I am so proud to be a part of it. Please know that we are here if you need us. To that end, we’ve created a website with information you need to navigate this crisis. Please visit and let us know if there is anything we can do to help. Over the last several weeks, although physically distant, we have come together in so many impactful ways. And together, we will slow the spread of this virus by doing our part -- by staying home, strictly limiting our contact with others, and continuing to frequently wash our hands. Thank you again for all of your support. I look forward to the time when we will again meet face to face. \-- Margaret | = | To be removed from this email list, please . Chuck Schumer thinks he can steamroll this election by pouring millions into Maine. What he doesn't realize is that we have something on our side that is far more important than his billionaire cronies: _**YOU.**_
**YOUR support today will ensure that we have the funds needed to fight back and WIN in November.**
[**Your support today**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PoGrG-xbvku-kLGhqqa5vbHOuPc9MOIiqs-SOaHio9OAu_SJqHylcqaUAhJJynYf1MHkLIm8gSmQw6eLluqjx2XAL5PSErbfNhLPTS5nJC8L8pvOBmst8Pq1zOY5rTo5EylxdA6mtUSnpVDBLNg9Z_oDa7TsBFn35ukMLl02-KVqQ9U32bACPqfBIEjpxT11bI87wwXEU15wUoB_BY0YdTymanHX-SefP7fcoVDnL65a5mSmfepgYseib-9G-VbpLsz0J8ixUCs7KGSfuzJ5pJ_gBl_q2-6I6moBRKAy2hEooUxrGIV91QLTLhyhSX-ElP-FXRvBQTRDuVxm6L2uFgPzk3lBMVyYW2-Fqs8YWI6ooRved8G0FQ==&c=DpWE9g1YbLBD3NLFj5cm-DPyAtTPp8YhGUwLdbQ7UwGeh_EVzXALMg==&ch=IRnrrxhOxw9koKtBqjERGiH6dWcy6R2WaIuk2zGmweDaPAEpxmphgg==) will ensure we don't let New Yorker Chuck Schumer cherry-pick Maine's next Senator to become a rubber stamp for whatever bills and votes he wants.
**Susan can 't do this alone. She needs your help to fight back.** We hope she can count on you.
Sincerely,

clean_body: Chuck Schumer's Super PAC has $70 million in their pockets and he is targeting Maine with one purpose: Take over the Senate by winning Maine. We need your help to fight back. == Friend, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC has $70 million in its pockets and he is targeting Maine with one purpose: Take over the Senate by winning Maine. We need your help to fight back. == First Chuck Schumer hand-picked a candidate to run against Susan Collins, and now he's using his ability to raise millions from outside-of-Maine donors to attack her. While Chuck Schumer and his allies are willing to go to extremes to get rid of her, Susan will not back down. But the millions of dollars pouring into Maine could have a disastrous impact on this election, if we don't have the resources necessary to ensure Mainers know the truth about her and her record -- rather than the lies being fed to them by Senator Schumer and his cronies. Susan can 't do this alone. She needs your help to fight back. == == == == == == == == == == Chuck Schumer thinks he can steamroll this election by pouring millions into Maine. What he doesn't realize is that we have something on our side that is far more important than his billionaire cronies: YOU. YOUR support today will ensure that we have the funds needed to fight back and WIN in November. == will ensure we don't let New Yorker Chuck Schumer cherry-pick Maine's next Senator to become a rubber stamp for whatever bills and votes he wants. Susan can 't do this alone. She needs your help to fight back. We hope she can count on you. Sincerely, Team Collins P.S. If you don 't want Chuck Schumer deciding who represents Maine, then we hope you will join Susan in fighting back against this advertising monstrosity in Maine. == == == == == == == == == == == == == Paid for by Collins for Senator == | | Collins for Senator | PO Box 1096, Bangor, ME 04402 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net in collaboration with |

body:
Fellow Democrat,
As you have heard, our Primary Election Day is now**Tuesday, June 9, 2020.** We want you to know that we are doing everything we can to navigate through these uncertain and unprecedented times. The safety and health of all of you is our top priority. We have taken measures to keep our staff safe, to keep all of you safe, and to ensure that our progress keeps moving forward even though it may look a little different now.
We are working together via phone and electronically to do the best we can to ensure that 2020 is a successful year for Democrats. In order to be successful, we have to be safe.
We have come up with a few ways to keep everyone informed as we move forward. All of the information we are providing can be found on our **#WVDemsVote** page linked here: [https://wvdemocrats.com/voting-in-the-2020-primary-election-covid-19-edition/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16814842/178955700/35889842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTgzMDQwZS0yYTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76NBQDmR9tngnAtoS8SeRsRtY82bx2LpBiqM84F8yZA=&emci=aa1aaf65-2575-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=b183040e-2a75-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)

Below are a few notes to give you an idea of what we've been working on. Thank you all for working with us and being patient.
Stay safe,
Belinda Biafore, Chair
🗳 ⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️ 🗳
**1\. We have compiled a list that includes our Democratic contacts County-by-County.** If you have any concerns about voting in your County, please contact the Democrats or your County Clerk listed on the pages. You will click the link provided and find your County which is sorted alphabetically.
You can find your Democratic contacts and resources page here: [https://wvdemocrats.com/democratic-contacts-by-county/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16814843/178955701/-411157658?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTgzMDQwZS0yYTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76NBQDmR9tngnAtoS8SeRsRtY82bx2LpBiqM84F8yZA=&emci=aa1aaf65-2575-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=b183040e-2a75-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)

**2\. Primary Election Date Change = Tuesday, June 9, 2020**
****
Changing the Primary Election Day changes other dates and timelines for the Primary Election. We have compiled a list of important dates and changes that came from the Secretary of State's Office. The dates are below but also can be found on our #WVDemsVote page linked here: [https://wvdemocrats.com/voting-in-the-2020-primary-election-covid-19-edition/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16814844/178955702/35889842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTgzMDQwZS0yYTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76NBQDmR9tngnAtoS8SeRsRtY82bx2LpBiqM84F8yZA=&emci=aa1aaf65-2575-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=b183040e-2a75-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16814845/178955703/35889842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTgzMDQwZS0yYTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=76NBQDmR9tngnAtoS8SeRsRtY82bx2LpBiqM84F8yZA=&emci=aa1aaf65-2575-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=b183040e-2a75-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)

**3.** **Absentee Voting: **
🗳 Every West Virginian can now request an Absentee Ballot because of COVID-19.
_**Every registered voter in West Virginia will receive an Absentee Ballot Application in the mail. Start looking for these in your mailbox the week of April 6.**_
* If you do not receive your Absentee Ballot Application, please check with the Secretary of State's Office and your County Clerk to make sure your registration information is correct.
* If you do not receive your Absentee Ballot Application you may still request one on the website.
* If you have already requested one, or request one and also get your application in the mail. Please only send in one application to avoid duplication and confusion.

**4\. COVID-19 Resources **

clean_body: Fellow Democrat, As you have heard, our Primary Election Day is nowTuesday, June 9, 2020. We want you to know that we are doing everything we can to navigate through these uncertain and unprecedented times. The safety and health of all of you is our top priority. We have taken measures to keep our staff safe, to keep all of you safe, and to ensure that our progress keeps moving forward even though it may look a little different now. We are working together via phone and electronically to do the best we can to ensure that 2020 is a successful year for Democrats. In order to be successful, we have to be safe. We have come up with a few ways to keep everyone informed as we move forward. All of the information we are providing can be found on our #WVDemsVote page linked here: Below are a few notes to give you an idea of what we've been working on. Thank you all for working with us and being patient. Stay safe, Belinda Biafore, Chair 🗳 ⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️⬇️ 🗳 1\. We have compiled a list that includes our Democratic contacts County-by-County. If you have any concerns about voting in your County, please contact the Democrats or your County Clerk listed on the pages. You will click the link provided and find your County which is sorted alphabetically. You can find your Democratic contacts and resources page here: 2\. Primary Election Date Change = Tuesday, June 9, 2020 ** Changing the Primary Election Day changes other dates and timelines for the Primary Election. We have compiled a list of important dates and changes that came from the Secretary of State's Office. The dates are below but also can be found on our #WVDemsVote page linked here: 3. Absentee Voting: 🗳 Every West Virginian can now request an Absentee Ballot because of COVID-19. Every registered voter in West Virginia will receive an Absentee Ballot Application in the mail. Start looking for these in your mailbox the week of April 6. If you do not receive your Absentee Ballot Application, please check with the Secretary of State's Office and your County Clerk to make sure your registration information is correct. If you do not receive your Absentee Ballot Application you may still request one on the website. If you have already requested one, or request one and also get your application in the mail. Please only send in one application to avoid duplication and confusion. 4\. COVID-19 Resources WV DHHR Website: ** Senator Joe Manchin III's Office has provided critical information on their website linked below: ** Senator Joe Manchin III's COVID-19 Informational page: Again, all of this information can be found on our website by Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). name: Charles Booker
subject: This is a dire situation — our nurses need our help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Will you join me in standing with the nurses fighting this pandemic on the front lines? Sign the National Nurses United petition and join the largest nurses union in the country in demanding that Congress provide the protective gear they need.
**Urgent: There’s a dire, nationwide shortage of personal protective equipment (PPE) for nurses and health care workers.**
**[Sign our petition demanding Congress take action to provide critical PPE resources for nurses →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817415/178984836/983167398?source=em20200402&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200402-aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4OWRiYy0zNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRhfbE7UFL1nTb5scIvZifi6RDMgJlq8ouMnsLlFWGM=&emci=12303d76-2975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1a489dbc-3775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
* * *
Nurses and health care workers are currently on the frontlines battling the COVID-19 crisis.
They are literally risking their lives every day they go to work, especially with the dire shortage of personal protective equipment (PPE) like masks, gowns, and other supplies.
Nurses are being told to make their own makeshift masks and use bandannas to protect themselves. I’m in awe of their courage, but disgusted with the lack of action to rush resources to our frontline nurses.
**And rather than honoring their bravery, Trump has unleashed a wave of attacks on nurses and health care workers, while he sits there and does nothing. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817416/178984837/983167398?source=em20200402&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200402-aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4OWRiYy0zNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRhfbE7UFL1nTb5scIvZifi6RDMgJlq8ouMnsLlFWGM=&emci=12303d76-2975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1a489dbc-3775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)
**[Will you join me and stand with the frontline nurses fighting this pandemic? Sign this National Nurses United petition and join the largest nurses union in the country to demand that Congress provide the protective gear they need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817417/178984838/983167398?source=em20200402&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200402-aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4OWRiYy0zNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRhfbE7UFL1nTb5scIvZifi6RDMgJlq8ouMnsLlFWGM=&emci=12303d76-2975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1a489dbc-3775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817418/178984839/983167398?source=em20200402&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200402-aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4OWRiYy0zNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRhfbE7UFL1nTb5scIvZifi6RDMgJlq8ouMnsLlFWGM=&emci=12303d76-2975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1a489dbc-3775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
The truth is, if our nurses aren’t safe, our families and communities aren’t safe.
The coronavirus crisis is about to take a turn for the worse in many states and we must make sure our nurses and health care workers have the resources to protect themselves.
Together we fought for people-focused relief efforts and were able to direct the conversation in Congress to center around working-class Americans who have been hurt the most by this pandemic.
**Now, we need to fight for our nurses.** Especially as Trump tries to place blame on nurses, it’s important we show overwhelming public support for Congress to rush resources to frontline nurses.
**[It takes just 30 seconds to sign this petition. Please, add your name now to help nurses fight for life-saving, protective equipment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817419/178984840/983167398?source=em20200402&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200402-aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4OWRiYy0zNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRhfbE7UFL1nTb5scIvZifi6RDMgJlq8ouMnsLlFWGM=&emci=12303d76-2975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1a489dbc-3775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817420/178984841/983167398?source=em20200402&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-20200402-aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4OWRiYy0zNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRhfbE7UFL1nTb5scIvZifi6RDMgJlq8ouMnsLlFWGM=&emci=12303d76-2975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=1a489dbc-3775-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
History will remember the heroes who took care of our loved ones and fought to get us through this pandemic. I hope you’ll join me in supporting them today.
— Charles

** **

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817421/178984842/188543492?refcode=em20200402-aa-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ4OWRiYy0zNzc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRhfbE7UFL1nTb5scIvZifi6RDMgJlq8ouMnsLlFWGM=)****

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Chuck Schumer’s plan to win the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
We are in the middle of a crisis. But it is important to remember that the Democrats are exploiting that crisis to try to pass the Green New Deal and if they take back the Senate this Fall, that's what they'll do.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42170061&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDIxOTgyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

We are in the middle of a crisis. But it is important to remember that the Democrats are exploiting that crisis to try to pass the Green New Deal and if they take back the Senate this Fall, that's what they'll do.

That is why I am writing on behalf of my friend Senator Steve Daines, a conservative Republican from Montana.

Steve is tough on crime, he stands up to China, and he's against illegal immigration. He's being challenged by failed presidential candidate Steve Bullock who is weak on China and wants open borders.

And this race will be close. **If we lose in Montana, the Republican Senate majority will be gone.**

[**Donate NOW to help protect the Republican Senate Majority.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIxNzAwNjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDIxOTgyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

I am asking you to make a contribution to Steve Daines' campaign. **[100% of what you donate will go to help Daines win Montana and help us keep the Senate. ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDIxNzAwNjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDIxOTgyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

We can't afford to lose a good conservative like Steve Daines -- especially to radical liberal Steve Bullock who is weak on China.

**Steve will fight back against the left-wing mob and their radical agenda and that 's why they are going to spend MILLIONS to defeat him.**

[**Will you chip in $5, $25, $50 or even $100 to help hold the Senate Majority and help my friend Senator Steve Daines?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDIxNzAwNjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDIxOTgyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

There is so much at stake in this election and the liberal mob is more fired up than ever to defeat Trump Conservatives all across the country.

Republicans are being outraised and outspent. [**With November fast approaching we need to catch up and ensure we have the resources to fight back and expand our Senate Majority.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDIxNzAwNjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDIxOTgyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Democrats know that their path to the Senate Majority runs through Montana.

If Steve Daines loses in Montana--Chuck Schumer will become Senate Majority leader and the liberal mob will have total control.

We cannot let that happen.

[**Donate NOW to help protect the Republican Senate Majority.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIxNzAwNjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MDIxOTgyNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

In service,

Tom Cotton

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: End US reliance on the Chinese Communist Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F0QH9LPtMUjcojw9EgEf9ICqgpcTxGoJ3CG0XFoJGY-y8b36ZEmJakoJvazPX273giZWuUPqmE235NCEFtiAxygvPeDbSWlPh0XLHzzn_-fsUHUXXRytUG0Zu0HzErXRdmfsioXsgWXm1ZlRXm4evcoJKgPGtvXy8hElPkvdxm0=&c=dmrd0FjjIG3AU2TKH2zth6-hjbzRnva8h0wF-eZAulDmDFHm74YI9w==&ch=2Dgl6O2iOyLIXeExToUqRFYmq8FjSzoLQzFXqPhj8rb3yEWrKpajnA==)

| Patriot,
I'm writing to you with troubling news! The FDA has just given the green-light to Beijing Genomics Institute (BGI), Communist China's leading genetic sequencing entity, to start operating in the U.S. BGI has been collecting Americans' DNA for years, and now has permission from the U.S. to continue doing so!
After Communist China hid information about the coronavirus and lied about the outbreak, why would we let them into the US and give them access to this invaluable information?
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F0QH9LPtMUjcojw9EgEf9ICqgpcTxGoJ3CG0XFoJGY-y8b36ZEmJakoJvazPX273giZWuUPqmE235NCEFtiAxygvPeDbSWlPh0XLHzzn_-fsUHUXXRytUG0Zu0HzErXRdmfsioXsgWXm1ZlRXm4evcoJKgPGtvXy8hElPkvdxm0=&c=dmrd0FjjIG3AU2TKH2zth6-hjbzRnva8h0wF-eZAulDmDFHm74YI9w==&ch=2Dgl6O2iOyLIXeExToUqRFYmq8FjSzoLQzFXqPhj8rb3yEWrKpajnA==)
---
| We are letting a hostile communist country collect, store, and study the DNA of Americans that could be used to engineer a biological weapon. And the mainstream media will never report on this because they are determined to defend China and repeat their state-run media talking points.
China has walked all over the US for decades, and it's time we put an end to it! If you agree, I need you to send a message that [THE US MUST NOT TRUST THE CHINESE COMMUNIST PARTY WITH OUR MEDICAL INFORMATION.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F0QH9LPtMUjcojw9EgEf9ICqgpcTxGoJ3CG0XFoJGY-y8b36ZEmJakoJvazPX273giZWuUPqmE235NCEFtiAxygvPeDbSWlPh0XLHzzn_-fsUHUXXRytUG0Zu0HzErXRdmfsioXsgWXm1ZlRXm4evcoJKgPGtvXy8hElPkvdxm0=&c=dmrd0FjjIG3AU2TKH2zth6-hjbzRnva8h0wF-eZAulDmDFHm74YI9w==&ch=2Dgl6O2iOyLIXeExToUqRFYmq8FjSzoLQzFXqPhj8rb3yEWrKpajnA==)

| | | [CLICK HERE TO SEND A MESSAGE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F0QH9LPtMUjcojw9EgEf9ICqgpcTxGoJ3CG0XFoJGY-y8b36ZEmJakoJvazPX273giZWuUPqmE235NCEFtiAxygvPeDbSWlPh0XLHzzn_-fsUHUXXRytUG0Zu0HzErXRdmfsioXsgWXm1ZlRXm4evcoJKgPGtvXy8hElPkvdxm0=&c=dmrd0FjjIG3AU2TKH2zth6-hjbzRnva8h0wF-eZAulDmDFHm74YI9w==&ch=2Dgl6O2iOyLIXeExToUqRFYmq8FjSzoLQzFXqPhj8rb3yEWrKpajnA==)
---
| It is unbelievable to me that this is not a bigger issue right now. But the media will look the other way to protect China and their lies about the coronavirus. We need to step up and make sure our voices are heard! Please click the link to send a message and sign your name to the petition to END OUR TRUST AND RELIANCE ON THE CHINESE COMMUNIST PARTY.
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F0QH9LPtMUjcojw9EgEf9ICqgpcTxGoJ3CG0XFoJGY-y8b36ZEmJakoJvazPX273giZWuUPqmE235NCEFtiAxygvPeDbSWlPh0XLHzzn_-fsUHUXXRytUG0Zu0HzErXRdmfsioXsgWXm1ZlRXm4evcoJKgPGtvXy8hElPkvdxm0=&c=dmrd0FjjIG3AU2TKH2zth6-hjbzRnva8h0wF-eZAulDmDFHm74YI9w==&ch=2Dgl6O2iOyLIXeExToUqRFYmq8FjSzoLQzFXqPhj8rb3yEWrKpajnA==)

| God bless America,

name: Tina Smith
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — During this unprecedented public health and economic crisis, our team asked you to donate to two incredible organizations serving Minnesota families: Second Harvest Heartland Food Bank and Meals on Wheels America. These nonprofits were in great need of resources to serve those most impacted by the coronavirus pandemic in our communities. I was amazed by your overwhelming response. Not only have you continued to support our campaign, but you went above and beyond to donate to these causes. Together, we raised nearly $40,000 to feed our most vulnerable during this difficult time. You stepped up in a big way, friend. I was blown away. To say thanks, I wanted to share a short message of my gratitude: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817654/178988382/531378050?refcode=em200402-charity&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVhMzZlNS0zODc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5x576BtWjTOVwMyibtqDFcdlqoe-4jB3b92F6X9e0o=) **[I know this is a stressful time for many families, but if you have any change to spare, I hope you will consider pitching in (if you have not already done so) and split a donation between Second Harvest Heartland Food Bank and Meals on Wheels America. Please, only pitch in if you can afford to do so.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817655/178988383/531378050?refcode=em200402-charity&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVhMzZlNS0zODc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B5x576BtWjTOVwMyibtqDFcdlqoe-4jB3b92F6X9e0o=)** I am so grateful you are a part of this team. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. — Tina

name: Georgette =?iso-8859-1?b?R/NtZXo=?=
subject: “Slow moving tsunami”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817916/178991175/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGIxZWFlNS0zOTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeOXy63LpeBQt5kwo948fyNvGIP1OLCtXqhjrUADoPE=&emci=3db6aa6b-2675-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=9db1eae5-3975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
Quick update, team.

Right now, San Diego-based hospitals are preparing for coronavirus cases to spike in the next month. One local health care provider described it as an imminent and “slow-moving tsunami.”

**Local hospitals are also running out of medical equipment like surgical masks and ventilators.** This shortage of protective gear is a rapidly deepening crisis, not only in San Diego, but nationwide. The images of nurses wearing trash bags or worse, stories of nurses dying because of unnecessary exposure, are simply unconscionable.

[**Please sign our petition and call on Congress to ensure nurses have the essential protective equipment they so desperately need to reduce their exposure to COVID-19.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817917/178991176/-1592237177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGIxZWFlNS0zOTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeOXy63LpeBQt5kwo948fyNvGIP1OLCtXqhjrUADoPE=&emci=3db6aa6b-2675-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=9db1eae5-3975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864) **[Tell Congress: Protect our Nurses!](https://secure.ngpvan.com/qQNNvz1FOky84EfLTm50Mg2)** There are more than 30,000 registered nurses in San Diego, which means there’s a good chance you know someone -- a friend, neighbor, family member -- who is still working and saving lives during this crisis.

The folks who are working day and night to save as many people as possible shouldn’t have to put their lives at risk too.

[**Sign on: Join nurses across San Diego and the country calling for immediate support from Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817918/178991177/-1592237177?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGIxZWFlNS0zOTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeOXy63LpeBQt5kwo948fyNvGIP1OLCtXqhjrUADoPE=&emci=3db6aa6b-2675-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=9db1eae5-3975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)

Thanks for your support,

_Georgette_
**[Tell Congress: Protect our Nurses!](https://secure.ngpvan.com/qQNNvz1FOky84EfLTm50Mg2)**

---
Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
---
Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. _**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16817919/178991178/1136511447?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGIxZWFlNS0zOTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeOXy63LpeBQt5kwo948fyNvGIP1OLCtXqhjrUADoPE=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3db6aa6b-2675-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8/9db1eae5-3975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGIxZWFlNS0zOTc1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeOXy63LpeBQt5kwo948fyNvGIP1OLCtXqhjrUADoPE=&id=110960909&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

| | Folks, This is exactly the kind of leadership we need in Washington right now -- Folks, This is exactly the kind of leadership we need in Washington right now -- [](https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/m/44257d8d/71661046/4842ffc/1933733b/1018529334/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=A2Fnca_HJ6FeVMUv47F3ZOA "https://go.firemitchsaveamerica.com/page/s/FIR_EM_EN_200402_ThankAmy_U2_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=saveamerica&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=FIR_EM_EN_200402_ThankAmy_U2_X1&source=FIR_EM_EN_200402_ThankAmy_U2_X1") While Mitch McConnell is busy pointing fingers at Democrats and blaming the Trump administration's slow coronavirus response on impeachment, Amy McGrath is putting the people of Kentucky first. As a former Marine, Amy has dedicated her career to serving our country -- and she knows that being a true public servant means stepping up to help American families when they need it most! name: Christy Smith
subject: I mean this sincerely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Dear Peter,

I want to give you my sincerest thank you for all of your support -- especially in a time of uncertainty.

The COVID-19 pandemic has affected each and every one of us, and I'm very thankful for the folks who could afford to chip in a few dollars to our campaign over the past few weeks. Thank you to our volunteers calling and texting voters every day. Thank you to each person who is sharing our message online.

**Seriously, we could not be at the point that we are in this campaign right now without the energy and enthusiasm you bring, even in the face of adversity.**

Right now, there are so many people in CA-25 that need our appreciation. Our doctors, nurses, and first responders are manning the frontlines of this pandemic to protect our health. Our delivery workers are still out on the road making sure our mail and packages get to us in time. Our teachers are juggling their own families' well-being with our children's learning. Grocery store and restaurant workers are keeping us all fed. The list of people we need to extend our appreciation to goes on and on.

**I propose that we come together as a district in a time where we physically cannot be there for each other.**

So for those of us staying home, there are still things you can do to help folks out. Call your friends and family to see how they're holding up. Offer to pick up groceries for your neighbor who's immunocompromised. Join a mutual aid group in your area to share important resources. Any small gesture will go a long way, including _staying home to keep others safe._

Again, thank you for your help this month -- from our primary to now, a lot has happened, but I know that your support has not wavered.

Let's continue to extend our helping hand around the district where we can. Even if we can't physically be there for each other -- we're there.

Stay safe and healthy,

\-- Christy [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d7/29776869/a119933/569fb10a/1620300231/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDJfZW9xdHkifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200402_eoqty") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d7/29776869/a119933/569fb10b/1620300231/VEsE/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d7/29776869/a119933/569fb104/1620300231/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8d7/29776869/a119933/569fb105/1620300231/VEsC/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

name: Nikki Foster
subject: We did it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce0c/30a4f917/50bea583/28cd205b/3375198835/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200402_TY_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200402_TY_U2_X1")

| | Friends, this is inspiring. Even in a time of crisis, we came together around a vision of a better future, and we all pitched in what we could. **As a result, we met our end of quarter goal, and we 're that much closer to beating Steve Chabot.** Thank you so much -- I can't express how grateful I am for your belief in this movement. It's clear that we've had enough irresponsible leadership, and we're all ready to chip in to make it happen. I'll be honest -- these next few weeks will be a challenge. Now that our election is entirely by mail, **every single day until April 28th is Election Day.** We have to constantly be in contact with voters to let them know about these significant changes. Thanks to your support, we're in a good position to do so. Even in dark times, there's always a reason to have hope. This week has shown me that like never before. Onward, Nikki | | | [Donate ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200402_TY_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Donate+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200402_TY_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200402_TY_U2_X1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: New primary date + volunteer at home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Learn more about our "Phone from Home” program. Tap or click >> | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/new-primary-date-volunteer-at-home?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=19e0678e8b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Indiana Republican,

You’ve likely seen the news – the 2020 primary election, originally scheduled for May 5th, has officially been moved to June 2nd.

Another new development? _ALL Indiana voters can now vote by mail in the primary!_

As we hunker down at home to limit the spread of COVID-19, we strongly support Governor Holcomb’s decision to delay this election, and we’re shifting our outreach and get-out-the-vote tactics to practice social distancing.

We’ve now launched a new program that enables Indiana Republican Party volunteers to make phone calls from home!

Today, we’re looking to recruit 100 Hoosier Republicans to get involved.

**[Will you sign up today to make phone calls in your spare time?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2c86cc4ca1&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

It’s vital that we let voters know what’s at stake in the 2020 elections, and let them know that they can cast their primary ballots by mail.

If you’d like to make a direct impact to support President Trump, Governor Holcomb, and Republicans down the ballot, **[please sign up today](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=aace1a06f0&e=1acd9bb3d6)**.

Thank you,

Indiana Republican Party

---
| [Join Our "Phone from Home" Program!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7b339fc351&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Join Our "Phone from Home" Program!")
