name: Brandon Hegar (MJforTexas.com)
subject: I want to do everything I can to help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I don't think I could possibly be more proud of MJ. It's been incredible to watch her take her campaign all over Texas.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a1/7f51f7bc/4cfd9eca/4ef1cbad/2043920656/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

I don't think I could possibly be more proud of my wife MJ. It's been incredible to watch her take her campaign all over Texas. And even after COVID-19 forced her to suspend in-person events, she didn't miss a beat -- she transitioned everything online and committed to working even harder to build the campaign she needs to defeat Sen. Cornyn in November.

I want to do everything I can to help MJ win this race. **That 's why I've promised to get 500 new supporters to endorse MJ's campaign for Senate. [Will you help me reach my goal by endorsing her today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a1/7f51f7bc/4cfd9eca/4ef1cbac/2043920656/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-endorsements")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a1/7f51f7bc/4cfd9eca/4ef1cbac/2043920656/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-endorsements")
---
I know MJ will fight for what's right as our senator because that's what her entire life has been about, from when she was flying rescue helicopters in Afghanistan to when she took on the Pentagon to open hundreds of thousands of ground combat jobs to women.

And I know it because I've seen how much she loves our little boys, and how much she wants to secure a bright future for _all_ children.

It's why she's fighting so hard to protect our communities from climate change and gun violence, make sure that _everyone_ can get the health care they need, and stand up for women's reproductive rights.

MJ has already been endorsed by some incredible organizations who believe in what she's fighting for -- Planned Parenthood Action Fund, Giffords Campaign, EMILY's List, End Citizens United, and more. But in my view, the most important endorsements come from folks like you.

**But with so many powerful and well-connected forces lined up on the other side, MJ needs you on her team too.[Will you join MJ's fight to create a Senate that works for all of us and add your endorsement to her campaign today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a1/7f51f7bc/4cfd9eca/4ef1cbac/2043920656/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-endorsements")**
**[**ADD YOUR ENDORSEMENT**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a1/7f51f7bc/4cfd9eca/4ef1cbac/2043920656/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-endorsements")**
Thanks,
Brandon Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903a1/7f51f7bc/4cfd9eca/4ef1cba3/2043920656/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200402.2__1146__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: Vice President Pence thanks American workers for keeping food on the table
body:
On behalf of a grateful nation, "thank you for doing a great job, for keeping food on the table for the American people." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ae69e2d4fd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 2, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: Vice President Pence thanks American workers for keeping food on the table**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c5334614d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **To slow the spread** of Coronavirus, many Americans are doing their part by staying home and socially distancing. In distribution centers across the country, workers are contributing in another crucial way: by making sure families have food and supplies during this pandemic.

**Vice President Mike Pence** visited one of these busy hubs yesterday—a Walmart Distribution Center near Gordonsville, Virginia.

**On behalf** of a grateful nation, “thank you for doing a great job, for keeping food on the table for the American people,” the Vice President told workers over the intercom.

**Great American companies** like Walmart are stepping up to ensure our national supply chains don’t miss a beat during this global crisis. “You’re on the front lines,” Vice President Pence said. “And the fact that you’re showing up every day, you’re rolling your sleeves up and you’re doing the work, says an awful lot about each and every one of you—about the way you love your neighbors and the way you love your country.”

🎬 [Thank you to the men and women working around the clock!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82d600493a&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch:** [“These are not numbers; these are Americans”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0062c94a4a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **These 30 days: How you can help**

**President Trump** announced updated guidelines this week to continue slowing the spread of Coronavirus in America. This [30-day window](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85210afaf4&e=3ee4985eea) will be crucial: If every American does his or her part, the latest models suggest we could save 1 million or more U.S. lives.

**🎬****Surgeon General:** [Why these next 30 days matter](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28698bc348&e=3ee4985eea)

**“We’re attacking the virus** on every front with social distancing, economic support for our workers, rapid medical intervention—and very serious innovation—and banning dangerous foreign travel that threatens the health of our people,” President Trump said yesterday. “And we did that early.”

**“Together, we have the power** to save countless lives.”

**Developed by public health experts** on the White House Coronavirus Task Force, these guidelines remain essential for containing the virus and protecting the most vulnerable among us:
* **Listen and follow all directions** from your state and local authorities.

* **Avoid social gatherings,** especially those with more than 10 people.

* **Practice strict personal hygiene.** Wash your hands and avoid touching your face. Sneeze or cough into a tissue or the inside of your elbow.

* **Use pickup or delivery** options instead of eating at restaurants or bars.

* **Work from home** if at all possible. Do not go to work if you feel sick.

* **If someone in your household** tests positive for Coronavirus, keep the entire family at home and contact your medical provider.

**If every American** follows these guidelines, our country will be well on track to manage this outbreak and ultimately defeat the virus once and for all.

**“In this time of need,** I know that every American will do their patriotic duty and help us to achieve a total victory,” President Trump says.

**🎬**[30 days to slow the spread: How to protect yourself and others](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e362889b94&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump delivers remarks on enhanced counter-narcotics operations and increased border security during a press briefing** | April 1, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92c8e39c9e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a14f19d0f1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c3ccefb1dc)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Tom Steyer
subject: The EPA needs to protect us — not Big Oil
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
**The Environmental Protection Agency has decided it will no longer protect the environment, friend.
**
The EPA recently announced it would suspend all enforcement of environmental laws for the indefinite future — abandoning its mission at the request of oil and gas companies. Then it rolled back one of our nation’s strongest attempts to combat climate change: the clean car standards enacted by President Obama. Director of the EPA and former coal lobbyist Andrew Wheeler is essentially using the coronavirus pandemic as an excuse to bail out his polluting friends.

Fossil fuel industries now have an open invitation to pollute our air and water without consequence further, endangering people’s health and exacerbating the climate crisis. **Add your name if you think the EPA needs to do its job and protect our communities.**
---
| [Tell the EPA to do its job](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZgtEWFVxoUaG7cQrRAp6kOsU7GOFWNsVRBg8X55YHFqG-2FuehqywlYPw4jTbdttlfe6elI7CrHyKT7fiDVJiC2zY2XFpJ71q90NR8AhAYZHihD9I30B6mcPRVXZ0DFR-2Fd1fy9-2BOMtYnajN69LoUzGuYaQ0Ed-2BYMg8ahtI2oYfFoToGKWdb0ObJrrkIe4bbww9EQaaRGSIvj5qkLTvDavsjK8cX8JwRnAjWCBwJGuTm-2BwTNGhU_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFMHSZdG5p9-2BMYHeSKk-2Fd9QIm76xT6pW5W7wBiiiOBsrSnz9rnNp-2BAJpP7GKxVrvNoP8vgjK92TQ78-2FVONA9PG-2BeGAax3lU9XxQl74qKXgM-2B9DaJuFcyJkdU6-2BnYXIv7kPCBGOizpQmHgAnTa-2Fqvp76ScftG8zKqpmGSQABWvpZbSgjTdu6XVsxlptel2dzSR-2F1pJnmGtN39Ot04Isy6MGBK7KdXhnpUCIWvt4UT6DVKksP1uuYCsGx6OaZ73MXZ3fZvwiFsQ48gLISYSu7-2BrWUt4U4-2F-2FAJSJPylHWRihXsCFZ0ZmkYU7oVz2A2ogFFnvTCF6m0e6FA9z-2BUY7w16EdG32OMdJbqi8U2JAs8gWAJ3sDSpL05sQe8pk4G20galRnG5aMA4aIOueIoxA4TeEyh6mHPNAsUaAsO-2F-2BnEwamYbAwhn6SYcm90xZOChBDKiwJeiqIlva9ivGgQdspLaEkWbrTH-2FjsbNcZ1s7h2tUVsb0qGyY-2BV-2F3Dp5x0HNWLjKtVhORcBY9tnXvs1G-2ByiWTi-2B-2BH1e-2FAQZp-2BBzA78PS4b333qSS8JxcYeQ6yi-2FjYKyiBkJ8CprtQwrNfu9IndvKN-2BtEMJ6Qd42eumq6ruS1ZodQzIRPxauN87kvFnuFIcQR33yeFbZth1hVpporBVuNyYPKIfB80VpVhrmWtCvcQ30GwUNaATEl1Wtdf4KWaHBP7ab8JHq0Rug51UboGNnPfCKw-3D)

Thanks to Donald Trump putting Wheeler in charge, the EPA has completely relinquished its authority to protect our environment and our communities from pollution and climate change. Air pollution has historically been concentrated in low-income communities and communities of color which has caused an increased rate of respiratory issues, making these communities even more vulnerable to COVID-19. By suspending its enforcement of pollution restrictions and rolling back the clean car standards, the EPA is turning its back on the communities most in need.

Little by little, Mr. Trump’s disastrous deregulatory agenda has stripped back our basic environmental and public health protections. And after he meets with the CEOs of Big Oil companies tomorrow, it will only get worse. [_**We cannot stand by and let the EPA hand over complete control to corporations.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZgtEWFVxoUaG7cQrRAp6kOsU7GOFWNsVRBg8X55YHFqG-2FuehqywlYPw4jTbdttlfe6elI7CrHyKT7fiDVJiC2zY2XFpJ71q90NR8AhAYZHihD9I30B6mcPRVXZ0DFR-2Fd1fy9-2BOMtYnajN69LoUzGuYaQ0Ed-2BYMg8ahtI2oYfFoToGKWdb0ObJrrkIe4bbww9EQaaRGSIvj5qkLTvDavsjK8cX8JwRnAjWCBwJGuTm-2BwTyeEd_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFMHSZdG5p9-2BMYHeSKk-2Fd9QIm76xT6pW5W7wBiiiOBsrSnz9rnNp-2BAJpP7GKxVrvNoP8vgjK92TQ78-2FVONA9PG-2BeGAax3lU9XxQl74qKXgM-2B9DaJuFcyJkdU6-2BnYXIv7kPCBGOizpQmHgAnTa-2Fqvp76ScftG8zKqpmGSQABWvpZbSgjTdu6XVsxlptel2dzSR-2F1pJnmGtN39Ot04Isy6MGBK7KdXhnpUCIWvt4UT6DVKksP1uuYCsGx6OaZ73MXZ3fZvwiFsQ48gLISYSu7-2BrWUt4U4-2F-2FAJSJPylHWRihXsCFZ0ZmkYU7oVz2A2ogFFnvTCF6m0e6FA9z-2BUY7w16EdG32OMdJbqi8U2JAs8gWAJ3sDSpL05sQe8pk4G20galRnG5aMA4aIOueIoxA4TeEyh6mHPNAsUaAsO-2F-2BnEwamYbAwhn6SYcm90xZOChBDKiwJeiqIlva9ivGgQdspLaEkWYfPWF9xiVpP3kV-2BsrRwYguRhENNka6Bh5pcjv84zB-2FNBM3YiyjZavJOqjrpoY-2FRRpNp0ddtxFhpIhSP5du9xPEUmTN5nT2YxgxdZukzEuKvMMOVECH0vpyux9soPveKyKWh5j6sf3HaKiMwE-2FOZkG8yLvq4JNrgAFzpBWlFaZubj9OoAvBJpeCpaHxKXTp-2FHq2KuP5uHodBeqDIqOmZlrsNVB7DkEolDASfscs3USTUC1HaxJjSgMl421zvuJ-2FKNo-3D)

clean_body: | | | | The Environmental Protection Agency has decided it will no longer protect the environment, friend. The EPA recently announced it would suspend all enforcement of environmental laws for the indefinite future — abandoning its mission at the request of oil and gas companies. Then it rolled back one of our nation’s strongest attempts to combat climate change: the clean car standards enacted by President Obama. Director of the EPA and former coal lobbyist Andrew Wheeler is essentially using the coronavirus pandemic as an excuse to bail out his polluting friends. Fossil fuel industries now have an open invitation to pollute our air and water without consequence further, endangering people’s health and exacerbating the climate crisis. Add your name if you think the EPA needs to do its job and protect our communities. | Thanks to Donald Trump putting Wheeler in charge, the EPA has completely relinquished its authority to protect our environment and our communities from pollution and climate change. Air pollution has historically been concentrated in low-income communities and communities of color which has caused an increased rate of respiratory issues, making these communities even more vulnerable to COVID-19. By suspending its enforcement of pollution restrictions and rolling back the clean car standards, the EPA is turning its back on the communities most in need. Little by little, Mr. Trump’s disastrous deregulatory agenda has stripped back our basic environmental and public health protections. And after he meets with the CEOs of Big Oil companies tomorrow, it will only get worse. In this fight, Tom | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Please visit for information and resources to help slow the spread of COVID-19 and prevent infection. Follow CDC guidelines, including social distancing to avoid large groups and unnecessary contact with others, and adhere to instruction from your local and state elected officials. We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking — we’ll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
